highlights.text: Rome (2N) → Tuscany (2N) → Lake Como (2N) → Venice (1N) sovereign circuit
Colosseum Gladiator's Gate & after-hours Vatican access
Private helicopter to Tuscany & Riva yacht on Lake Como
Uffizi, Accademia VIP & Bellagio botanical gardens

itinerary.title: Luxury Italy Grand Expedition
itinerary.overview: Indulge in the absolute zenith of European opulence with TRAGUIN's sovereign expedition. Private after-hours Vatican access, helicopter flight across Tuscan vineyards, custom Riva yacht on Lake Como, and historic Venetian palazzo stays — designed for the world's most discerning travelers.
itinerary.seo_title: IT-003 | Luxury Italy Grand Expedition | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Ultra-luxury 07 Nights / 08 Days Italy package (IT-003): Colosseum private access, after-hours Vatican, helicopter to Tuscany, Lake Como Riva yacht, and Venice palazzo stay.

highlights.text: Mahogany Riva Yacht on Lake Como

days.title: Arrival in Rome & Private Colosseum Entry
days.description: VIP aircraft-side greeting at Rome Fiumicino. Private luxury transfer to hotel. Exclusive Colosseum tour through the Gladiator's Gate to the arena floor. Michelin-starred rooftop welcome dinner.
activities: Sightseeing Included: VIP aircraft-side greeting, Colosseum private arena floor entrance
Evening Experience: Michelin-starred rooftop welcome dinner overlooking Roman Forum
Overnight Stay: Rome Centre (Ultra-Luxury Heritage Palace Hotel)
Meals Included: Gourmet Tasting Menu Welcome Dinner

days.title: Private After-Hours Vatican Access
days.description: Relaxed morning shopping on Via Condotti. Private after-hours tour of Vatican Museums and Sistine Chapel with historian guide.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Exclusive after-hours private Vatican Museums & Sistine Chapel opening
Overnight Stay: Rome Centre (Ultra-Luxury Heritage Palace Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Traditional Roman Fine Dining Lunch

days.title: Rome to Tuscany via Private Helicopter
days.description: Luxury helicopter flight across Val d'Orcia to medieval castle wine estate. Private Brunello cellar tasting with head sommelier.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private helicopter Rome to Tuscany, Brunello private cellar tasting
Overnight Stay: Tuscany Estate (Ultra-Luxury Wine Resort & Sanctuary)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Exclusive Vineyard Estate Pairing Lunch

days.title: Privileged Florence Concierge & Duomo Trail
days.description: Private VIP access to Uffizi and Accademia Galleries. Private shopping with fashion consultant in Florence leather workshops. Return to countryside estate.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Uffizi & Accademia VIP private entry, Duomo private terrace balcony
Overnight Stay: Tuscany Estate (Ultra-Luxury Wine Resort & Sanctuary)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Fine Dining Tuscan Gastronomy Dinner

days.title: Tuscany to Lake Como via Riva Yacht Charter
days.description: Private executive transfer to Lake Como. Board custom mahogany-hulled Riva speedboat past Villa d'Este and Villa del Balbianello to lakeside palace resort.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Private transfer, private mahogany Riva yacht charter cruise
Overnight Stay: Lake Como (Ultra-Luxury Waterfront Palace Resort)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Lakeside Al Fresco Gourmet Dinner

days.title: Lake Como Seclusion & Bellagio Charm
days.description: Morning at resort spa and floating pool. Private water craft to Bellagio. Villa Melzi botanical gardens with private guide.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Villa Melzi botanical private pass, private water taxi to Bellagio
Overnight Stay: Lake Como (Ultra-Luxury Waterfront Palace Resort)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Fine Dining Lakefront Dinner

days.title: High-Speed Rail to Venice & Grand Canal Apex
days.description: High-speed executive train to Venice. Private water taxi to grand canal palazzo. Vintage wooden vessel sunset cruise. Grand farewell candlelight dinner on private terrace.
activities: Sightseeing Included: High-speed executive rail, private water taxi, vintage vessel sunset cruise
Evening Experience: Grand farewell candlelight dinner facing Grand Canal
Overnight Stay: Venice Island (Grand Luxury Canal-view Palace Hotel)
Meals Included: International Breakfast & Grand Farewell Venetian Dinner

days.title: High-End Resort Farewell & Departure
days.description: Luxurious breakfast on private terrace. Personal butler handles checkout. Private water taxi to Venice Marco Polo VIP terminal.
activities: Transfers Included: Private water taxi to airport VIP terminal, luggage coordination
Meals Included: International Buffet Breakfast

inclusions.text: 07 Nights in world-renowned ultra-luxury palaces, wine resorts, and lake-view suites
Private after-hours Vatican Museums access and Colosseum Gladiator's Gate entries
Private helicopter flight from Rome to Tuscan estate
Private mahogany Riva yacht day on Lake Como and vintage vessel cruise in Venice
Full ground transits in private high-end vehicles and executive first-class trains
TRAGUIN dedicated 24/7 personal butler coordination and destination experts
International flight tickets and Schengen visa processing fees
Personal expenses, room service, dry cleaning, and mini-bar billing
Optional tours or individual gourmet dinners not specified in the itinerary
